channel.title: Starmer Watch — Pressure Index
channel.description: Composite pressure index, top news, and market signals for Keir Starmer's leadership.

item.title: Pressure Index 61/100 (elevated)
item.description: Public pressure bloc is above the modeled 81 MP trigger. Pressure Index 61/100 (elevated). Polymarket's top Starmer-exit signal is 22.5%.

item.title:
Bluesky · @jessicaelgot.bsky.social: Streeting has seen which way the wind is blowing and it is blowing towards Greater Manchester
My analysis on the kind of day when years happen.
www.theguardian.com/politics/202...
item.description:
Streeting has seen which way the wind is blowing and it is blowing towards Greater Manchester
My analysis on the kind of day when years happen.

item.title: Guardian (Open Platform): Starmer will not attempt to block Burnham from standing to be MP in Makerfield - UK politics live

item.title: Guardian (Open Platform): Labour MP to stand down to allow Burnham run for byelection amid leadership row

item.title: ITVX: Andy Burnham confirms he intends to run for parliament after MP stands aside - ITVX

item.title: ITVX: The latest headlines - as Streeting quits government and says he's 'lost confidence' in Starmer - Latest From ITV News - ITVX

item.title: Independent UK Politics: Burnham makes move to take on Starmer after MP stands down so he can challenge PM
